message:
feat: Add PIVOT transformation support

- Parse PIVOT clause: PIVOT (AGG(col) FOR pivot_col IN ('val1', 'val2', ...))
- Support SUM, COUNT, AVG, MIN, MAX aggregation in PIVOT
- Execute PIVOT by grouping non-pivot columns and computing aggregates
- Add PIVOT/UNPIVOT to keyword list to prevent alias parsing confusion

Test results: 226 passed, 6 failed, 3 skipped (96% passing)
